a_image.alt: Parallax Scrolling style mood board — Heavy Motion · Scroll-Driven

sections.a_eyebrow: Parallax · Heavy Motion · Scroll-Triggered · Immersive Motion · Engaging
sections.a_description: Layered depth, cinematic scroll reveals, and the immersive feeling of moving through a visual narrative — Parallax Scrolling design transforms the browser into a storytelling stage where foreground and background move at different speeds. The floating content panels, dramatic shadows, and vivid accents create a sense of dimensional space that rewards the act of scrolling itself.

This scroll-driven style powers product launch pages, brand storytelling experiences, creative agency portfolios, and interactive annual reports. You'll see it on automotive brand sites, luxury product reveals, tourism campaigns, and long-form editorial pieces — anywhere that transforms passive scrolling into an active, cinematic journey through layered visual content.

a_image_cover.alt: Parallax Scrolling style use case illustration
Parallax Scrolling style use case illustration
Parallax Scrolling style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The immersive, scroll-driven aesthetic of parallax websites — layered depth, dramatic reveals, and the cinematic feeling of moving through a visual story. Background: rich dark (#111111) creating depth for layered content. The .inner panel floats with a white background (#ffffff) and generous padding — a content island amid the immersive scroll experience, with a soft shadow (0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)) suggesting elevation above background layers. Colors: vivid coral (#f43f5e) as the primary accent — energetic and attention-grabbing as content scrolls into view. Near-black (#1a1a1a) for headings, warm gray (#64748b) for body text. The aesthetic is cinematic and storytelling-driven — each scroll reveals a new scene. Set in Poppins — geometric, modern, with enough personality to carry narrative content. Heading at weight 700, 28px, line-height 1.2, letter-spacing -0.5px, color #1a1a1a. Eyebrow at weight 600, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #f43f5e. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #64748b. Buttons: primary — vivid coral (#f43f5e), white text, 8px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, coral border. Alternatives: DM Sans (clean geometric), Outfit (modern geometric).
